codeReview.summary: The dependency addition is correctly implemented. Zod is correctly added as a peer dependency (^3.0.0) allowing users to provide their own version, and zod-to-json-schema is added as a regular dependency (^3.24.0). The changes are minimal, well-targeted, and follow the mission's dependency policy.

issues.description: The peer dependency range for zod (^3.0.0) is broader than what zod-to-json-schema@3.25.1 requires (^3.25 || ^4). While this works currently (bun resolved zod@3.25.76 which matches both), users with older zod versions (e.g., 3.20.x) could encounter peer dependency conflicts when installing zod-to-json-schema. Consider documenting this constraint or narrowing the peer dependency range to match the actual requirement.

summary: Feature passes review. Dependencies are correctly configured with zod as peer dependency and zod-to-json-schema as regular dependency. All validation steps passed (bun install, typecheck, test, import verification). The worker followed the TDD procedure correctly - no implementation code needed for a dependency-only task, but verification via import test was performed. Minor non-blocking observation about peer dependency version range alignment.
